theorem prop_85 (xs: List α) (ys: List β) :
  (length xs = length ys) →
    (zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)) :=

tactic_nodes.tactic_text:
induction xs generalizing ys with
| nil => _*_
| cons x xs ih => _*_

input_obligation.goal: length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)

output_obligations.goal: length [] = length ys → zip' (reverse []) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' [] ys)

hypotheses.name: ih
hypotheses.type: ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)

output_obligations.goal: length (x :: xs) = length ys → zip' (reverse (x :: xs)) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' (x :: xs) ys)

hypotheses.type: ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)

input_obligation.goal: length (x :: xs) = length ys → zip' (reverse (x :: xs)) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' (x :: xs) ys)

hypotheses.name: ih
hypotheses.type: ∀ (ys : List β), length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)

output_obligations.goal: zip' (reverse (x :: xs)) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' (x :: xs) ys)

tactic_nodes.tactic_text:
cases ys with
| nil => _*_
| cons y ys => _*_
have h' : length xs = length ys := by simp only [length] at h; omega
have hL : length (reverse xs) = length (reverse ys) := by simp [length_reverse_eq', h']
simp only [reverse, zip']
rw [zip'_append_singleton' _ _ _ _ hL, ih ys h']
